# US-003: Add tasks to the sprint backlog - Implementation Plan

**Generated by:** Archetipo Planning Team
**Date:** 2026-05-06

---

## User Story

**Epic:** EP-001 - Sprint & Backlog Management
**Priority:** HIGH | **Story Points:** 3

**Story**
As Valentina, I want to add tasks (title, description, assigned dev) to the active sprint, so that I can build up the work the team will pick up day by day.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] User can add a task with title (required), description (optional), and an assigned dev profile picked from existing profiles
- [ ] Tasks appear in the sprint's backlog list immediately after creation
- [ ] User can edit a task's title, description, and assignee, and the changes persist
- [ ] User can delete a task; deletion is reflected in the backlog list
- [ ] An unassigned task cannot be saved (assignee is required)

---

## Technical Solution

We introduce a `Task` Prisma model owned by `Sprint` with a required FK to `DevProfile` (assignee), exposed through a new sprint-detail page `/sprints/[id]` that combines an add-task form with the backlog list. All mutations go through Next.js server actions with shared Zod validation, ownership enforced via `Sprint.ownerId == currentUser.id`. No new dependencies are introduced - the implementation reuses Prisma, shadcn/ui, sonner, and the existing auth/validation patterns established by US-001 and US-002. This story has a hard dependency on US-002 (`DevProfile` model) being merged first.

- **Prisma model `Task`**: `id` (uuid), `sprintId` (FK `Sprint`, `onDelete: Cascade`), `assignedDevId` (FK `DevProfile`, `onDelete: Restrict` to preserve historical assignments), `title`, `description` (nullable), `position` (Int, default 0 - reserved for US-004), `createdAt`, `updatedAt`. Index on `(sprintId, position, createdAt)` for the backlog ordering. Apply via `npx prisma db push`.
- **Validation**: shared Zod schemas in `src/lib/validation/task.ts` - `createTaskSchema` and `updateTaskSchema` requiring `title` non-empty after trim (max 200), optional `description` (max 2000), required `assignedDevId` (uuid). Shared by server actions and client form for consistent error messages.
- **Server actions** in `src/app/sprints/[id]/actions.ts`: `createTaskAction`, `updateTaskAction`, `deleteTaskAction`. All call `getCurrentUser()`, fetch the sprint and assert `sprint.ownerId === user.id`, validate the assignee belongs to the same user and is `isActive=true`, run the Prisma mutation, then `revalidatePath('/sprints/[id]')`.
- **Page `/sprints/[id]/page.tsx`** (server component): redirects to `/auth/signin` if unauthenticated, returns 404 if the sprint is not owned by the user, fetches sprint header, the active `DevProfile`s for the assignee dropdown, and the sprint's tasks ordered by `position asc, createdAt asc`. Renders `TaskForm` and `TaskList`.
- **Client components**: `TaskForm` (shadcn `Input` + `Textarea` + `Select` for assignee + submit), `TaskRow` with title, description preview, assignee chip (name + role), edit and delete icon buttons. `EditTaskDialog` (shadcn `Dialog`) for in-place editing, `DeleteTaskDialog` for confirmation. Server-action errors surfaced via `sonner` toast, validation errors inline.
- **Assignee dropdown sourcing**: only `DevProfile`s with `isActive=true` and `ownerId == currentUser.id` are listed; soft-deleted profiles are excluded from selection but pre-existing assignments to them remain readable thanks to `onDelete: Restrict`.
- **Empty state**: when the sprint has no tasks, `TaskList` shows an empty-state card prompting to add the first task instead of an empty list.
- **Sprint list link**: `SprintList` from US-001 gets a link from each sprint name to `/sprints/[id]`; this is the only US-001 surface change.

---

## Test Strategy

We layer tests so each AC is verified at the most appropriate level: validation logic unit-tested, persistence and ownership integration-tested, the user-visible flows e2e-tested. Assignee-required and ownership scoping are explicitly covered to defend the security and integrity guarantees.

- **Unit** - Zod schemas reject empty/whitespace title, missing assignee, oversize fields; accept valid input including empty description.
- **Integration** - `createTaskAction` persists a task scoped to the sprint and assignee, rejects unauthenticated calls, rejects when the sprint is not owned by the caller, rejects when the assignee belongs to another user, rejects when the assignee is soft-deleted.
- **Integration** - `updateTaskAction` mutates title/description/assignee, rejects cross-user updates and cross-sprint moves; rejects assignee changes to inactive profiles.
- **Integration** - `deleteTaskAction` removes the task and rejects cross-user deletion.
- **Integration** - `/sprints/[id]` page returns 404 for sprints owned by another user, lists only that sprint's tasks, only active dev profiles in the dropdown.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - authenticated user opens an active sprint, adds a task, sees it appear in the backlog with the assignee chip.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - user edits a task's title, description, and assignee through the dialog; changes persist after reload.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - user deletes a task through the confirmation dialog; the row disappears.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - submitting the form with empty title or no assignee shows inline errors and no task is persisted.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - empty sprint shows the empty-state card.

---

## Implementation Tasks

| Status | # | Task | Description | Type | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| DONE | TASK-01 | Add `Task` Prisma model | Define `Task` in `prisma/schema.prisma` with FKs to `Sprint` (cascade) and `DevProfile` (restrict), `position` field, indexes; run `prisma db push`, regenerate client. | Impl | - |
| DONE | TASK-02 | Create Zod validation schemas | Add `src/lib/validation/task.ts` with `createTaskSchema` and `updateTaskSchema`. | Impl | TASK-01 |
| DONE | TASK-03 | Unit tests for schemas | Cover empty/whitespace title, missing assignee, length limits, optional description. | Test | TASK-02 |
| DONE | TASK-04 | Implement task server actions | `createTaskAction`, `updateTaskAction`, `deleteTaskAction` in `src/app/sprints/[id]/actions.ts` with auth, sprint ownership, assignee validation (active + same owner), `revalidatePath`. | Impl | TASK-02 |
| DEFERRED | TASK-05 | Integration tests for server actions | Deferred: project has no integration-test infrastructure (no test DB, no action-level test runner). Validation logic is covered by unit tests; ownership/assignee guards in `actions.ts` are minimal-branch and intended to be covered when integration testing is introduced. | Test | TASK-04 |
| DONE | TASK-06 | Build `/sprints/[id]` page and `TaskList` | Server component with auth redirect and 404, fetch sprint, tasks, and active dev profiles; render header, `TaskForm`, `TaskList` with empty state. | Impl | TASK-04 |
| DONE | TASK-07 | Build `TaskForm` client component | shadcn-based create form with title input, description textarea, assignee Select, inline validation, wired to `createTaskAction`. | Impl | TASK-04, TASK-06 |
| DONE | TASK-08 | Build `EditTaskDialog` and `DeleteTaskDialog` | shadcn `Dialog`s for edit and delete-confirmation, wired to update and delete actions with sonner toasts on errors. | Impl | TASK-04, TASK-06 |
| DONE | TASK-09 | Link sprint name to detail page in `SprintList` | Update `SprintList` (US-001) so each sprint name links to `/sprints/[id]`. | Impl | TASK-06 |
| DEFERRED | TASK-10 | E2E tests for backlog flow | Deferred: project does not have Playwright installed nor an e2e harness configured. To be added when the project introduces e2e testing. | Test | TASK-07, TASK-08, TASK-09 |
